argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const wait = (ms) => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) { const rd = window.rawData; const goods = rd?.store?.initDataObj?.goods; if (goods && goods.goodsID) { const mall = rd.store.initDataObj.mall || {}; const gallery = (goods.topGallery || []).map(g => g.url || g).slice(0, 5); return [{ title: goods.goodsName || '', goods_id: String(goods.goodsID || ''), price: '¥' + (goods.minGroupPrice || ''), original_price: goods.minNormalPrice ? '¥' + goods.minNormalPrice : '', sales: goods.sideSalesTip || '', shop_name: mall.mallName || '', shop_sales: mall.salesTip || '', img_url: goods.thumbUrl || '', gallery: gallery.join(','), url: 'https://mobile.pinduoduo.com/goods.html?goods_id=' + goods.goodsID }]; } await wait(500); } return [{error: 'initDataObj.goods not ready after 10s'}]; }

variables.name: delay
variables.help: 随机浏览时间基数(ms), 实际时间为 delay ~ 2*delay
